CREATE TABLE networks (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip INET);
SELECT * FROM networks WHERE ip < inet '192.168.1.5';
CREATE TABLE devices (device_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, device_ip INET, network_id INTEGER REFERENCES networks(id));
SELECT d.device_id FROM devices d JOIN networks n ON d.network_id = n.id WHERE d.device_ip < inet '192.168.1.9';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM networks n WHERE n.ip < (SELECT MAX(ip) FROM networks WHERE ip < inet '192.168.1.5');
SELECT n.id FROM networks n WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM devices d WHERE d.device_ip < n.ip);
CREATE VIEW filtered_networks AS SELECT ip FROM networks WHERE ip < inet '192.168.1.10';
SELECT * FROM filtered_networks WHERE ip < inet '192.168.1.5';
SELECT d.device_id FROM devices d WHERE d.device_ip IN (SELECT n.ip FROM networks n WHERE n.ip < inet '192.168.1.5');
